description_long: This is a modern, freestanding newspaper and magazine stand with a sleek, angular design and a matte black finish. The front features two vertical columns of angled shelves, each displaying three magazines with visible covers, making the publications easily accessible and highly visible to passersby. The sides are solid and sharply contoured, providing structural support and a contemporary aesthetic. The back is fully enclosed, while the top is open, allowing for easy restocking of publications. The stand appears to be constructed primarily from metal or a dense plastic, giving it a sturdy and durable feel suitable for outdoor urban environments. Its overall form is compact yet tall, designed to maximize display space while occupying minimal sidewalk area.
description: A sleek, black, freestanding newspaper and magazine stand with angled display shelves and a modern, angular design. The front showcases multiple magazines for easy access and visibility.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, angular profile and the depth of the stand.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two columns of angled shelves filled with magazines, highlighting the main interactive area.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the angular profile and solid construction.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a fully enclosed, flat back with no visible openings or features.
attribute_newspaper_title_signage: magazine covers as signage, no dedicated masthead
